notes: Mexico were without suspended CB César Montes (red card vs South Africa) forcing Edson Álvarez into a defensive reshuffling, while Julián Quiñones was a slight doubt after being withdrawn through injury in the opener but was expected to start. South Korea came into the match fully fit and with no suspensions — captain Son Heung-min and Lee Kang-in both came through the Czechia win unscathed, with the only selection debate being whether to start impact sub Oh Hyeon-gyu from kick-off.
home_scorers: Raúl Jiménez (leading striker, scored header vs South Africa)
Julián Quiñones (winger/opener goalscorer, 5 shot attempts vs South Africa)
Luis Romo (midfielder, set-piece threat and box-to-box presence)
away_scorers: Son Heung-min (captain and primary attacking threat, on penalties)
Lee Kang-in (creative playmaker, direct goal threat)
Oh Hyeon-gyu (impact striker, match-winner off the bench vs Czechia)
